inputs.label: Cyclist Weight (including load)
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of the cyclist including any cargo, directly proportional to energy expenditure based on physics work equation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total mass of the cyclist including any cargo, directly proportional to energy expenditure based on physics work equation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bisikletçinin kargo dahil toplam kütlesi, fizik iş denklemine göre enerji harcamasıyla doğru orantılıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtmasse des Fahrers inkl. Ladung, direkt proportional zum Energieverbrauch basierend auf der physikalischen Arbeitsgleichung.

inputs.label: Total Cycling Distance
inputs.businessContext: Distance covered during the cycling activity, used to compute average speed and mechanical work done against friction and gradient.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance covered during the cycling activity, used to compute average speed and mechanical work done against friction and gradient.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bisiklet aktivitesi sırasında kat edilen mesafe, ortalama hız ve sürtünme ile eğime karşı yapılan mekanik işi hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zurückgelegte Strecke während der Radfahraktivität, verwendet zur Berechnung der Durchschnittsgeschwindigkeit und der mechanischen Arbeit gegen Reibung und Steigung.

inputs.label: Active Cycling Duration
inputs.businessContext: Net time spent pedaling, excluding stops; combined with distance to derive average speed for MET estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Net time spent pedaling, excluding stops; combined with distance to derive average speed for MET estimation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Duruşlar hariç pedal çevirerek geçen net süre; MET tahmini için ortalama hızı türetmek amacıyla mesafe ile birleştirilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Netto-Pedalierzeit, exklusive Stopps; kombiniert mit der Strecke zur Ableitung der Durchschnittsgeschwindigkeit für die MET-Schätzung.

inputs.label: Average Road Incline
inputs.businessContext: Average gradient of the route; positive incline increases effort and MET value linearly, negative reduces, zero for flat terrain.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average gradient of the route; positive incline increases effort and MET value linearly, negative reduces, zero for flat terrain.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rotanın ortalama eğimi; pozitif eğim eforu ve MET değerini doğrusal olarak artırır, negatif azaltır, düz arazi için sıfır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliches Gefälle der Strecke; positive Steigung erhöht den Aufwand und MET-Wert linear, negative reduziert, null für flaches Gelände.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
